since_last: 87% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.57%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 87% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -2.34% · Gold -1.59% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 87% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.57%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.57%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.37%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: EQIX is the standout at -9.94%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.79%, MRVL +6.03%, LRCX +5.30%, AMAT +4.73%, MU +4.65%. Laggards: EQIX -9.94%, BABA -0.79%, ROK -0.33%, ZS -0.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.58% at $192.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
